LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_LastSave: Real-world time of the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SaveDiff: Time elapsed since the last game save
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_Source: Data source of the current weather
LanguageData.RTRS_Desc_SolarTerm: Current traditional solar term or season simulation
LanguageData.RTRS_ApiNone: None (Disable real weather, use seasonal simulation)
LanguageData.RTRS_CityTooltip: Enter Pinyin or English, e.g., Beijing, London, NewYork.
LanguageData.RTRS_OpenWeatherKeyTip: Please get your Weather API Key from the official OpenWeather website.\n\n⚠️ WARNING: Do NOT enter your RimTalk Large Language Model (e.g., OpenAI) chat API Key here! They are not interchangeable!
LanguageData.RTRS_HeWeatherKeyTip: Please get your Weather API Key from the official QWeather Console.\n\n⚠️ WARNING: Do NOT enter your RimTalk Large Language Model (e.g., OpenAI) chat API Key here! They are not interchangeable!
LanguageData.RTRS_HeWeatherHostTip: Please check your QWeather Console -> Settings for your dedicated API Host (e.g., pw6xxx.qweatherapi.com).
LanguageData.RTRS_UseCelsiusTooltip: Uncheck this to use Fahrenheit instead.
LanguageData.RTRS_DebugModeTooltip: Print detailed logs to the developer console for asynchronous weather updates and variable registrations.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_None: Cannot test: Please select a valid Weather API source above.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_EmptyKey: Cannot test: API Key cannot be empty. Please enter your key.
LanguageData.RTRS_TestAPI_Fail: Connection Failed! Please open the developer console (Debug Log) for details on the server response.
LanguageData.RTRS_Error_EmptyHost: Connection Aborted: QWeather's API Host cannot be empty! Please enter your dedicated host in the Mod Settings.
